message:
fix(fj-conformance): increase batch runner test timeout to reduce flakiness

[frankenjax-os7o]

The test_batch_runner_marks_timeout test was flaky under load because
the 50ms timeout was too tight for actual execution overhead. Increased
timeout to 200ms and simulated delay to 500ms to maintain the same
test semantics while being more robust.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
